items.title: Sparks scored just 8 points in the third quarter, going 2-for-15 from the field in the process. Los Angeles is shooting 34% for the game and just 3-for-19 on 3s. They’ve turned the ball over 14 times. They have just 1 offensive rebound. Los Angeles trails 68-45.

items.title: Halftime: Storm 48, Sparks 37. Los Angeles shot 44% but just 2-for-12 on 3s and turned the ball over 9 times. Seattle was led by Flau’Jae Johnson’s 17 points. Dearica Hamby led the Sparks with 14. Storm made 7 triples.

items.title: July 6, 1996: The U.S. men's Olympic basketball team erases a 17-point halftime deficit against a USA Select Team during an exhibition game at the Palace of Auburn Hills.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 6, 1996: The U.S. men's Olympic basketball team erases a 17-point halftime deficit against a USA Select Team during an exhibition game at the Palace of Auburn Hills.

Scottie Pippen scored 17 PTS and Hakeem Olajuwon added 16 PTS in the debut of "Dream Team III," a 96-90 win.

items.title: A handful of people asked why the big Nets-Hornets-Bulls-Wolves trade hasn't gone official yet...
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
A handful of people asked why the big Nets-Hornets-Bulls-Wolves trade hasn't gone official yet...

That deal will have to wait until July 9. Mouhamadou Gueye, who the Bulls are trading as part of the deal, isn't eligible to be traded until July 9 because he was signed on April 9.

items.title: Ryan Conwell feels like the kind of guy who is going to have 16 points off the bench in January when other guys are injured and Spo gives us the, "He made us notice him, he made us play him..." speech afterward.

items.body_excerpt: Ryan Conwell feels like the kind of guy who is going to have 16 points off the bench in January when other guys are injured and Spo gives us the, "He made us notice him, he made us play him..." speech afterward.

items.title: In 1981, the Blue Jays went 32 innings without scoring.
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
In 1981, the Blue Jays went 32 innings without scoring.

In 2008, they did a 31-inning streak. They've done 30+ four times in franchise history.

H/T @snstats.bsky.social

items.title: Three quarters of Summer League ball and I'm ALL IN on Darryn Peterson.
items.author: Kurt Helin
items.body_excerpt:
Three quarters of Summer League ball and I'm ALL IN on Darryn Peterson. 

He is special. Explosive and can get a bucket, but really great playmaking and he's defending. Just so much to like.
